menu_subtitle: Structure your navigation by dragging items.
menu_structure_hint: Drag items into the active menu and manage levels.
available_items_hint: Available pages, posts, categories, and custom links.
label: Label
icon_custom_upload_hint: PNG, GIF, WebP or AVIF. Icons are stored in Media > Images.
icon_custom_invalid_type: Only PNG, GIF, WebP and AVIF files are allowed.
icon_custom_upload_unavailable: Custom icon upload is not available.
icon_custom_unavailable: The custom icon library is unavailable.
menu_translate_intro: Enter the localized labels to display for each language.
menu_root_items_warning: More than 6 top-level items can make the header denser on some themes.
menu_help_intro: Build the active menu first, then add the right sources from the library, and check the frontend after saving.
menu_help_step_library: Add pages, posts, categories, or custom links from the library on the right.
menu_help_step_structure: Then organize levels, labels, URLs, targets, and icons inside the active structure.
menu_help_step_save: Finally save the menu and check the frontend to validate hierarchy and labels.
menu_empty_text: Start by dragging items from the library or by creating a custom link. Once the base exists, adjust levels and labels.
